title: Somake Doors
description: A mod that adds doors with sliding animations.
body:
# Somake Doors

Somake Doors introduces a variety of animated sliding doors to enhance your modern builds, laboratories, and futuristic bases. From industrial steel to high-tech sci-fi designs, this mod provides the perfect entryway for any secure facility.

### **Features**

*   **Animated Sliding Doors**: Smooth 1x2 opening animations.
*   **Animated Big Sliding Doors**: Smooth 3x3 opening animations.
*   **New Resources**: Adds **Aluminium** and **Cobalt** ores to the world generation, along with their respective ingots and blocks.
*   **Multiple Variations**: Most doors come in different configurations, including split, side-sliding, and 2x1 versions.

### **Door Materials & Styles**

Aluminium, Steel, Dark Steel, Cobalt, Lion, Sci-Fi and Mechanized Steel.

### **To-do list:**
* **Add All Crafts**: Currently, we don't have crafting materials for all doors.
* **Resize Some Textures**: Correcting some textures that are larger than I planned.
* **New Doors**: New ports that I didn't have time to create because I was focused on the server launch.
---

### Mod Info
This mod was developed specifically for the **SSMP Somake Server**.
Join the adventure on our official modpack: [Somake Network]([https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/somake-network](https://modrinth.com/project/smp-somake))
